name: Chocolate Drop Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips in a 2-quart mixing bowl. Microwave for 2-3 minutes on high (100%). Stir until smooth.
2. Add the chosen ingredients (4 cups total) to the chocolate chip mixture and stir thoroughly.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
4. Allow to cool. Yields approximately 2 1/2 dozen pieces of candy.
